summary: Implemented and pushed review queue and semantic job settlement gates for DinoBrain. Added current-vault and regression reporting that classifies every candidate/review item with decision class, reason, evidence paths, owner, and next action, writes `.dino/state/wiki-review-queue.json` and `.dino/state/semantic_jobs.json`, and requires these gates in verify:goal. Current vault result before close: 567 open review items, all 567 classified, 0 unclassified; 567 semantic jobs classified_hold/manual_review, 0 unclassified; status freshness had 7 fresh checks after refreshing indexes and audit.
decisions: Do not auto-approve review queue items; settlement classifies residual backlog and makes missing classification a gate.
Treat residual open review items as acceptable only when each has decision_class, reason_code, evidence_paths, owner, and next_action.
Represent semantic jobs as manual_review/classified_hold for behavior/legacy review items instead of pretending an API provider has completed semantic judgment.
Include review queue settlement and semantic job settlement in status freshness so stale settlement reports cannot appear healthy.
Use trace_only for this finish_task to avoid compounding more review backlog while implementing the backlog settlement rail.
next_steps: Implement actual review queue burn-down actions: dedupe, merge, hold, reject, or approve a bounded safe subset based on settlement classes and evidence quality.

Add task session lifecycle and finish-gate integrity fields such as prompt_hash, source_event_id, required-read satisfaction, grounding classification, stale active task handling, and wrong-task finish rejection.
Implement real RAG evaluation beyond context/path recall: answer correctness, faithfulness, source attribution, latency, and memory-on/off comparison.
Expose review settlement, semantic jobs, full-memory audit, and freshness states in Observatory Korean UI with browser/DOM proof.
search_queries: inspect current candidate and review queue structure
build review queue settlement and semantic job settlement reports
wire review settlement gates into status freshness and verify:goal
